# Lucas Mujica — Webflow & Front-End Developer

> Senior Webflow & front-end developer, 5+ years deep — high-performing, component-driven Webflow sites with GSAP motion that marketing teams and small businesses can own, scale and maintain.

Lucas Mujica builds production-grade Webflow sites and custom-coded front-ends. Five-plus years and 100+ projects: component-first builds with CMS architecture, Webflow Localization and Ecommerce, GSAP/web animation, and React / Next.js when a build calls for it. Finsweet Client-First Certified Expert. Remote, worldwide.

## Pages
- [Home](https://lucasmujica.dev/): Overview, selected work, about, stack, process and contact.
- [Work](https://lucasmujica.dev/work): All case studies and projects.

## Case studies
- [True North Jerseys](https://lucasmujica.dev/work/true-north-jerseys): Custom hockey & baseball kits for a BC brand — a Webflow store, built different, with scroll-tied product reveals. (E-commerce build, 2026)
- [K2BTools](https://lucasmujica.dev/work/k2btools): Developer tooling for GeneXus — a trilingual (es/en/pt) Webflow site with performance-tuned Client-First motion. (Marketing site, 2025)
- [BIKE](https://lucasmujica.dev/work/bike): A Montevideo English school that teaches by talking — a Webflow build with a custom loader and an interactive 3D bike on the 404. (Webflow build, 2025)
- [Home Organizers LI](https://lucasmujica.dev/work/home-organizers): A Long Island organizing studio, hand-coded end to end — vanilla JS, GSAP, and a before/after slider built from scratch, down to JSON-LD LocalBusiness SEO. (Custom-coded site, 2026)
- [Nextfense](https://lucasmujica.dev/work/nextfense): A Montevideo cybersecurity firm — a bilingual (es/en) Webflow build with custom illustration for its managed-security platform. (Webflow build, 2025)
- [Seilas Ship Supplies](https://lucasmujica.dev/work/seilas-ship-supplies): A century-old Uruguayan ship chandler — a clean B2B Webflow site spanning 500+ clients across 30+ countries. (B2B site, 2024)
